title: Daewoo Sienna 1.7L Rapid Boil Kettle, 3KW Cordless Electric Kettle, 360° Base, Auto Shut Off, Taupe Finish, Home, Office, Student Kitchen
features: Rapid Boil Technology – Featuring powerful 3KW rapid boil technology, the Sienna kettle quickly heats water, saving you time during busy mornings or quick tea breaks
Elegant and Practical Design – The stylish taupe finish complements modern kitchens, while the 360° rotational base and cordless jug offer effortless pouring for left or right-handed users
Large 1.7L Capacity – Ideal for families, shared houses, or offices, the spacious kettle easily prepares multiple cups in one boil, with a clear water gauge for precise filling
Safety First Features – Includes boil-dry protection, auto shut-off, and a secure locking lid to ensure safe use, making it perfect for homes with children or shared spaces
Easy to Clean and Maintain – Removable limescale filter helps extend the kettle’s life, while the concealed heating element ensures simple cleaning and better hygiene
description: Life moves fast, and the Daewoo Sienna 1.7L Rapid Boil Kettle helps you keep up. Whether you’re a busy parent needing a quick morning brew, a student preparing late-night study snacks, or a professional on tight deadlines, the Sienna kettle is designed to make life easier. Thanks to its powerful 3KW rapid boil function, you'll have boiling water in minutes, perfect for tea, coffee, noodles, or even hot water bottles during chilly evenings. Its generous 1.7-litre capacity means it’s ideal for family breakfasts, hosting friends, or busy office environments. The elegant taupe design blends seamlessly into any kitchen, adding a touch of style. With its cordless body and 360° rotational base, it offers easy handling whether you're left- or right-handed. Safety is key, with features like boil-dry protection, auto shut-off, and a secure lid, giving you peace of mind, especially in households with children. Maintenance is hassle-free thanks to the removable limescale filter and concealed heating element. Choose the Sienna kettle for reliability, style, and speed, the perfect companion for every busy day.
